They only provide pure water for the first day. After that you have to buy it. 
We had to ask several times for a roll of toilet paper.

reviews.text:
I have stayed at the Hilton Garden Inn Casablanca three times over the past two years, and unfortunately, the hotel has declined significantly in just the last six months. What was once a reliable and comfortable stay is now a disappointing experience that falls well below Hilton standards.
The most frustrating issue is the lack of basic amenities functioning properly. The shower water pressure is nearly nonexistent and at times it only drips. Talking with other guests it does not matter what floor or room you are in, no water pressure. The hot water runs out quickly at high density times. Aft

Inconvenient location if the goal is to explore the city center - only get by taxi, the view from the window wasn't particularly good either, but for one night not bad

Whenever they noticed that my glass was almost empty, they would proactively refill it. They also kindly reminded me of the optimal serving temperature for the dishes. When I casually mentioned wanting a softer main course, they immediately communicated with the kitchen to make the necessary adjustments. Their service attitude was both gentle and professional, adding a huge plus to my dining experience!

Too bad, because the location south of Casablanca is rare and the value for money is correct.

Breakfast quality is great. The chef prepares a huge buffet that covers all needs and wihes and is more than willing to accomidate special wishes. Especially Ikram from breakfast is great. I was charged $200 for a 7-hour stay and was told I had to book two connecting rooms because I had three girls with me. Very limited choice of TV channels.

They removed the only French channel that was on the program, TV5
As a sign of ?? discrimination, ignorance or something, I was unable to obtain any clear and consistent response from management that would justify this change.
I am told re-programming, but no deadline and no guarantee that there will be at least one channel in Frenc

A warm welcome, modern and very comfortable rooms, and impeccable facilities. The pool and restaurant are a real plus. A perfect hotel for a relaxing stay. Thank you Mehdi has the reception really adorable

reviews.title: Nice hotel, very nice restaurant

reviews.title: First time experience

Breakfast was really good with hot food and freshly made eggs. Very good facility. Our room was amazing and was upgraded to a suit. Very clean and rooms were very big. Would always recommend. Had a pool and nice place. Very popular restaurant next door to the hotel.

I don’t advise you people to stay in this hotel even the location toooo any ride by taxi at lest from 120 Durham

reviews.title: Best garden Inn ever.
reviews.text: Immaculately clean. Responsive staff. Great breakfast which is most unusual for a Garden Inn. And as an added bonus the world’s greatest parking attendant. Location is convenient if you have a car, though there is a tram nearby which we did not try.

reviews.title: Hotel Hilton Garden, Morocco  is high and handsome
reviews.text:
This is very good business hotel, neat , clean and spacious room.
The rooms has lot of positivity and ample of sunlight. 
Bathroom and WC are neat and clean plus the toiletaries are of good quality. The buffet spread is very good but limited options for vegetarian people , the staff are warm and kind. I have enjoyed my stay here and would like to come again and again during my Morocco business tour. I also would  like to recommend this hotel for my business circle.

reviews.title: Only if you have to drive on this axis
reviews.text: Hotel of recent construction, near the highway, far from the city. Large and quite clean suite with comfortable bedding but with a cracked window tile. Unprofessional welcome, Check in very slow, billing error. Breakfast without interest, nothing fresh. Restaurant to escape: zero food and service idem.

reviews.text:
Cons:
It was a disaster with the hours of bar and restaurant. No one could agree on the hours of services. What I learned: 630am to 1030am breakfast 1st floor restaurant and Bar until 11pm.
Disaster with credit card payments. Payment system closes at 22:30 even though bar is open until 23:00. So, when I went to pay they said only cash. ATM not in hotel but next door at gas station. 
Requested a toothbrush and did not get it. Wi-Fi was terrible but at least good enough to stream Netflix.
No water fountains to fill a water bottle.
Check out time not confirmed upon check in.

reviews.title: Still feels like new
reviews.text:
Hotel is only 2 years old so all nice and fresh. 
Staff were all very friendly, breakfast was excellent which lots of Moroccan treats to try. 
I was upgraded to a suite which was amazing and also greatly appreciated - thank you ! 
The only reason I’m giving 4* is that it is quite a bit away from everything really , other than that I’d certainly recommend this hotel.

reviews.title: Very good hotel
reviews.text: Very new and upscale hotel, superb quality of furniture and amenities, and very friendly staff. The only draw back is location, otherwise I would’ve given it 5/5 easily. It is located more than 20 minutes outside Casablanca downtown, so anytime you want to go there you will need to take a taxi which is not cheap. Also, there is no walking paths or nearby stores what so ever, so in a way it makes you feel isolated (one building where the only way in or out is by car). There is a Moroccan restaurant attached to the hotel though (Chhiwat L’khayma), that is very beautiful and spacious, and serves

reviews.title: Standard Hilton Garden Inn Experience
reviews.text: This is a new hotel so the design and feeling is very fresh.  Rooms super functional and bright and comfortable.  No real functional bar/lounge, they have one but it is very low energy, not warm or welcoming - not some where you would want to hang out, not even sure if they sell beer/wine.   Breakfast was great, lots of choices and the room was spacious and bright.  Single best experience here was when our ride to the airport didn't show up and Loubna who saw us hanging around outside came to ask if we needed help which we did and she promptly had the hotel van take us to the airport that real

reviews.title: Comfortable rooms. Avoid the restaurant!
reviews.text: Perfectly comfortable rooms. Only the restaurant lowers the rating of this hotel at this price. Service which takes 45 minutes to an hour and it is not the fault of the waitress who is the only one to serve everyone. There is clearly a lack of staff. The first day we ate hot but the next day the meat was really cold. Also, no beer available and only one type of wine on the first evening.

reviews.title: To flee!
reviews.text:
A Ftor organized within the framework of our Association; about a hundred people
Horrible parking where you break your car, because you had to come with a moped, unfriendly security personnel, no assistance, no support.
A very worthy Ftor of a starless, dark place, you shouldn't look at what was on the Table.
Disoriented, poorly organized staff, Tables missing the minimum
Dishes prepared the day before apparently, brrf, a bad experience!

reviews.title: Clean and decent hotel but…
reviews.text:
Very clean room, comfortable bed, decent breakfast.
The downside is the shower. In the morning when everyone is getting ready to go to their appointments (many of the clients are there for business), the boiler does not keep up with the hot water… so you have to take a lukewarm or cold shower… we were at 7 and had the same problem at the same time in the 7 different rooms

reviews.title: Travelling on business for 3 nights and I would happily return.
reviews.text:
The location was reasonably close to the airport and where I needed to be so it worked out well. I had stayed in Casablanca city centre the last time and struggled with the traffic. There isn't much going on near the hotel, but there is a lot of construction work for offices/apartments so it could develop over the years. There's a Moroccan restaurant beside the hotel and McDonalds, Burger King, Pharmacy, ATM nearby. However, there isn't  footpath or much street lighting at night time so it's a bit risky.

The hotel is modern and well maintained. I didn't us the pool or gym facilities. Security

reviews.title: Good, clean and convenient
reviews.text: Stayed in this hotel as we drove from Marrakech to catch a flight in Casablanca.  It is quite far from the Corniche, and about twenty mins from the airport so the location wasn’t the best.  However, it is a good, clean, convenient hotel for an overnight stay and was quite reasonably priced.

reviews.title: This had never happened to me!
reviews.text: I am being asked for a penalty because I smoked in my room. The problem is that I am a non-smoker... what's more, this room, which is very pleasant, is equipped with non-opening windows and a smoke detector. So I wonder how it is possible to smoke in this case. Could this be to sneakily charge extra???

reviews.title: Best Hilton
reviews.text: Best Hilton Hotel. Room, clean, comfortable with all amenities. Staff was very accommodating, professional, and courteous.  Delicious dinner and Best breakfast  buffet. Huge selection of foods. Very pleasant stay.

reviews.title: Clean, spacious hotel!
reviews.text: Beautiful new hotel that was very spacious! Our room was spotless and felt like I was at home! The washroom was amazing and the lighting was amazing! The hotel has a beautiful pool and a good gym. Breakfast buffet was amazing with so many options! Very close to the airpot!

reviews.title: Beautiful stay with sweet memories
reviews.text:
In general it was a nice stay.
Bellboy service is not available to help with the luggage. It depends on availability only.
Staff were friendly and attentive to our inquiry and needs. 
Room was comfortable. Breakfast was full of variety. The hotel is modern and clean. 
Thanks to all staff. Moroccan people are very generous and courteous 🇲🇦❤️

reviews.title: An amazing one night experience and highly recommend.
reviews.text: Extremely comfortable, clean, and a great breakfast. Cpnsidering we are a family of 5, both our rooms were to the highest specification. I highly recommend. We only stayed here one night bit I wished we stayed longer. I would definitely visit again. Also very close to the airport do very convenient.

reviews.title: Wonderful hotel with superb service
reviews.text:
Pro:
- extraordinary welcome service with overwhelming service staff 
- modern hotel room with great interior
- huge breakfast choices with continental and local food, the egg station service was excellent 
Contra:
- the windows in the room cannot be opened, fresh air only with AC
- the artificial smells in the hotel was extremely strong

reviews.title: Good over night stay hotel
reviews.text: This hotel was very clean and also very friendly staff. One night we went to their Lounge/Bar area, very quiet and nice service. They sell alcohol, but it was pricey. We had our dinner at the traditional Morrocan restaurant next to the hotel. Their service was very slow, but the food was very good. The breakfast at the hotel was very nice. Typical western breakfast.

reviews.title: Shame on them
reviews.text: More than 10 days ago we made a reservation for Italian suppliers. You confirm, we get organized, everything's fine. Only at D - 2 you decide to send us a cancellation under the pretext: "no more availability". What professionalism! We understood that you wanted to sell the room at a higher price. What opportunism! I spoke to your reservations department on the phone. I insisted on the importance of maintaining this reservation. No response. Don't mind if I express myself on social networks!

reviews.title: Pleasant stay in a new hotel
reviews.text: We stayed one night at this property before flying out the next day. It is a 15-20 minute drive is to the airport and the front desk arranged shuttle service for us. Everything is new, fresh and clean in the guest rooms and public areas. The breakfast buffet with made to order omelets is included for Diamond members. Ikram in the restaurant and Zakaria at the front desk we’re both very friendly and helpful. It was a pleasant stay in a very new hotel.

reviews.title: Hotel for work…
reviews.text: It is a hotel with positive and negative points, for a business trip it is the best for a discovery trip to Casablanca, not great for the simple reason that the hotel does not offer anything, no discovery outing or activity in that sense…..other negative point all the windows in the hotel do not open!!!! for ventilation of the rooms not great!!!! even if you perfume your corridor it is not great the air conditioning is open well in the morning for ventilation it is still better 'the chains TV are not in French..????too bad the TVs are not connected to the wifi network!!!! For me the informatio

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: We just spent one night in this hotel, and I was extremely delighted by the welcome, the kindness of the staff, the rooms and the cleanliness, breakfast and service. I would particularly like to thank Faouzi who helped us take our luggage up and down, knowing that there is no baggage handler service. I would also like to thank the kindness of Nassima who came to see us at breakfast to ask us if we were missing anything. Frankly this hotel is a very welcoming image of Morocco and this is said by an Algerian. Thank you we will come back.

reviews.title: Amazing stay at Hilton garden inn Casablanca
reviews.text: This is an amazing hotel relatively new. I booked this hotel thru points for two different nights. It was an amazing experience. I am a diamond hilton member and was really well taken care of. The rooms are new and really nicely decorated. Thank you to Aziz, Fatima, the breakfast manager and staff. Thank you for an amazing experience.

reviews.title: Not the best Hilton I've stayed in
reviews.text:
Recently stayed here for 1 night whilst passing through Morocco, I was a little disappointed considering it is a Hilton hotel, and the room was very basic. The pool water looked very dirty, and it seemed very understaffed. Breakfast was disappointing with hot food choices being cold and the cold food choices being warm, which was not pleasant when eating a warm yoghurt! I tried to get a latte twice from the machine, which only gave black coffee, whatever you pressed on the machine!
Overall disappointing stay

reviews.title: Nice, new, comfortable hotel
reviews.text: New hotel. About 15 miles from the airport. Have stayed there twice for our trip (coming and leaving Morocco)  Rest of family staying day before their flight out of Casa, (that's how much we liked this place). Staff will bend over backwards for you. Rooms are good size. 2nd stay was in suite b/c it was only room left. Pull out bed was okay but wished mattress was bit thicker. Otherwise, beds are quite comfortable. Recommend having breakfast-outstanding with traditional Morocco foods along with omelettes made to order.. Nice good size pool and gym. Outside of hotel, there isn't much to walk to.

reviews.title: Midway Airpot-Casablanca
reviews.text:
This Hilton is a very good option for your stay in Casablanca, but keep in mind it’s distant from the city center and there isn’t much to see or do - even restaurants - in the hotel area. Not a problem if you rent a car and if not download the app “In Drive” to move around. A ride to the city costs about MAD 100 (EURO 10), compared to EURO 30  charged by taxis. UBER doesn’t work in Morroco. 
The hotel itself is  new, clean, fare priced, with a nice pool and gym. English and French are spoken almost everywhere and the food is very good.

reviews.title: Great time in Casablanca!
reviews.text: The room, lobby, restrooms were generally clean and the staff are very nice. In spite of not speaking much English they made the effort to communicate.  Ibtissam was very nice,  great customer relations.  Everyone always smiling!

reviews.title: Good Value
reviews.text:
The hotel was clean and functional. Comfortable beds and friendly service. 
Laundry was available for 15dh. 
Not a lot around - found a crepe truck near by one late morning that we could walk to. It was 250dh to get to from the central train station. Getting into town was 170dh - getting back in the evening was a bit of a challenge as many taxi drivers didn't know or wouldn't go so far out of town, but made it back for 200dh. Airport was 300dh for taxi.

reviews.title: Driving from airport.
reviews.text: You can drive to this hotel easily from the airport.  The breakfast is very nice and there is also a wonderful restaurant outside but part of the same building.  You can also drive to the big hypermarket.

reviews.title: Super nice
reviews.text: We picked this hotel bc it was closer to the airport but not too far out of the city with a cheap taxi. This hotel is sooo clean and the staff was very helpful and kind! Our room was amazingly comfortable. One night we had dinner at the restaurant and I had the Alfredo. It was shockingly delicious! Also has lounge to sit down and have some beer/wine/ or cocktails at. Was a nice stop on our last leg of our Morocco trip!

reviews.title: Good business hotel
reviews.text:

Staff is fiendly, breakfest is very ok. Rooms are ok. As diamond got room upgrade and free breakfest.
Hotel have lounge/bar (not executive) with couple TV and bar where alcohol is available.
On sunny saturday had intender to use swiming pool, but unfortunately it is located on north side from building and in november stood in shadow all day.
Taxi to downtown costs 50dirhams.
Local resta

reviews.title: Perfect for a night after long journey

Breakfast was very nice with lots of choices for any palate. They helped us with numerous questions. Would definitely recommend. Not close to the city center but easy to get a taxi.

reviews.title: Casablanca short stay
reviews.text:

Yes, the building, lifts, rooms & reception are all new & modern. There is that warm feeling missing. Maybe flowers on the breakfast tables! 

We also found a number of repaies going on - odd for a new building. Locks being replaced, windows being repaired & replaced, we even found  broken chair at breakfast.

I used the gym & one treadmill was out of order, but it's a well equipped gym. There is a lovely shop with all the necessary odds & gifts that one might need. The lounge &

reviews.title: Lovely Hotel, but a little remote
reviews.text:
Our room at the Hilton Garden Inn Casablanca was sparkling clean, quiet and very comfortable.    The staff were helpful.  The ladies from housekeeping were very nice and eager to help in any way they could.  
The hotel is located between the airport and the central city, so there's not much else around (gas stations on either side).  There is a good Moroccan restaurant right next door, which serves a delicious continental breakfast for $4 if you don't want to pay $15 for the hotel buffet. 
Shuttle to the airport is $40. for a 16 minute ride.

The rooms; although not very spacious but they are actually very good.

reviews.title: Ladrones
reviews.text:
+ Las instalaciones
- Habíamos reservado en Booking, el precio era de 97 € +2€ de tasas por persona (eramos 2). Eso son 102€. El recepcionista nos dice que son 102€, le damos 110€ en efectivo y de repente dice que no nos da cambio porque ese es el precio. Nos dice que pagando con tarjeta sí que serían 102€, pero que en efectivo son 110€. No entendemos el motivo, pero decidimos pagar con tarjeta y resulta que nos cobra lo mismo, 110€ Un timo. Se lo dijimos y le dió igual. No nos devolvió la diferencia ni se disculpó.

And then I called again on the second day to make sure that they also include dinner and that it will be debited from my card as I wanted it to be a gift for my parents and they  said yes  offcourse this will be no problem, and then when my parents arrived to the hotel to have dinner after a long journey. They said it wasn't possible that they had to pay immediat

It was the worst experience in my life. When I tried to check-out, there was no one in the front desk. I waited several minutes that one male staff was smoking at out of entrance. As he saw me waiting at the front, he ignored me. Thus, I was trying to find another staff. And the male staff taught me with pointing his fingers on my eyes and said that you have to wait here until I come. Very strangely, all staffs are very rude and I have experienced racial discrimination. Very disappointed in Hilton brand.

First of all, we were done with our wedding at 6am in the morning and happy all was well, until we reached this hotel. It was the worst experience i have had with a hotel and I've been into many places. As newly weds, the staff were supposed to be a bit more considerate towards this special situation and the lady on the front desk was the worst. Taking 5+ minutes everytime she asked for a document and no explanation or reassurance was given when it was needed. I was standing there with my wife both tired as hell for almost 15 to 20min. The hotel knew about our visit, yet no consideration was m

Rooms smell odd. Breakfast is filthy. Had to take 7 plates to find a clean one. One plate had hair, other had food residue. There was flies around the food. You could smell the food as it has been sitting and recycled who knows how many times. To avoid like the plague. We ended up leaving how disgusted we were

The shower water is very weak and hot water keeps cutting on and off from cold to hot. Also they do not include breakfast like other hotels in the same price and they charge much more for it. I scope with the Hotel manager about the issues and she did not care or apologize. The checking in process took a very long time and they did not even offer to help us take our luggage to the room. The manager was not professional when she was listening to my feedback/issues and was arguing vs solving problems she need training on how to make guest experience more welcoming and delightful. Bottom line loo

We stayed one night at this Hilton on Aug 16th, 2024, never coming back again for the following reasons:
- No water was provided for the checkout day, they made us wait one hour after requesting water from the reception, Zakariaa and the other woman who was with him claimed that I did not want the room service to come in, which was ridiculous since I called them twice for the water, at the end we came to the reception and they told us that they’ll give the water to us, but they changed their mind since they “remembered” that there is no water for the next day.
- No cleanup service was provided

This hotel is new, but a poorly run operation. My first room, 627, the door came off the hinge when I opened. The bellman helping with my bag said he would go get another room right away, it took an hour or so to move me down the hall to another room. Each day I had to call to refresh water and toiletries despite telling the cleaning crew when I would be out of the room. The temperature and water pressure are extremely unregulated (see video and other reviews). The manager Omar sent maintenance to fix it but the plumber said the 6th floor doesn’t get good water pressure. On the second floor th

Very disturbing experience. Just do yourself a favor and avoid here.
Water ran out in the middle of shower. I had to wrap myself in towel and call them two times. I was told they would resolve the issue in no more than 30 minutes. More than 30 minutes passed, nothing happened. I am going to bed now with unwashed shampoo in my hair 🙃

Nobody helped us with our luggages. One staff moved a cart to us and we have to carry all of our luggages from the car to the cart and all the way to our rooms.

The check-in process was more then 30 minutes and very unprofessional. After we gave reception our pas

Very bad experience, I have requested a new reciept for my stay to the hotel 10days no feedback, this hotel agent gives me an email and she initiated the email with 5 people in the loop, nobody feedback. Especially the finance department guys, they totally ignore their clients' request, continue kick the balls and let you wait endless. I send them around 10 emails and called them more than 10 times to ask for a new reciept.Till today still no feedback from the hotel, I feel my request is totally ignored multipal times by  sending or calling them, I can only leave the message here to expect the

Stayed here during last day of business trip due to close proximity to airport.
BUT: it is a mess to go to airport from here. No shuttle. Booked transport. Normal taxi showed up. Couldn't accept credit card. Booked Careem. Result: fight on parking between taxi and Careem...  Careem got intimidated, wanted to leave... became hostile...
Eventually we reached an agreement at 6AM as i had to catch my flight.
Just be informed. Not convenient.

Below zero, no baggage handlers, I wanted to check the meeting room they told me wait for the sales guy and I waited long time. The receptionist called him twice and he said am coming and then nothing it is a sign of disrespect. No one accompanying you to your room showing you the facilities, AC setup, direction for praying. Will never be back again. In the photo I added you can see my stuff and I had to transfer it myself to the room

Lovely hotel, rooms are big and very clean, the reception never passes on messages, and room service never answers or rings back on top of coffee machine at breakfast never work and the food looks like last night dinner leftovers, I'm a business traveller and never coming back

Very poor service and over priced!!
I don’t recommend at all !
No respect for privacy , not friendly
Pasable 4sur 10

I am usually a loyal guest at Hilton, but my recent stay at Garden Inn Casablanca was very disappointing. My fiancée and I booked two rooms, then we were not allowed to visit her at the same room, and the staff Ayoub threatened to call the police. Security guards stayed very close to me for over 30 minutes close to swimming pool, which was very uncomfortable.

The reception staff are not at all friendly.
They are condescending and very unpleasant.
Unless you insist, you don't get a paper invoice. They insist on sending it by email, which never arrives.
This is the fourth time I've spoken to them on the phone, and still no invoice.
Since this morning, November 13, 2025, at 8:45 AM, I've been trying to reach them, but no one answers... it's 9:20 AM.
Unacceptable, especially considering the prices they charge.
At 9:30 AM, I finally managed to reach the billing department, who insisted the invoice would be sent before noon. They refused to put me in tou

I had coffee there with friends and wandered around the terraces, but I was very disappointed. The coffee was served in a broken cup... Given my experience in the real estate industry, the workmanship and materials used in the area I saw are a real disgrace for a hotel of this type.
Ultimately, it has nothing to do with a 4-star hotel.

Worst hotel experience! After payment, the disturbance began with repeated phone calls until midnight. This behavior is unprofessional and unacceptable, especially compared to their other branches like Tangier, which respect their guests. I do not recommend this hotel at all.

Terrible hotel and service! This is not Hilton! I am a Hilton Honor Diamond guest.

This hotel is managed appallingly. The general manager and the sales manager are completely unprofessional and unpleasant. They are unavailable, haughty, and impossible to reach to report any problems encountered!
I am disappointed with my stay at your hotel. I do not recommend it at all.

(The rooms and meeting rooms did not meet expectations.)

I always genuinely enjoy my stays at Hilton Garden Inn Casablanca. It truly feels like my second home whenever I’m in Casablanca.

The hotel is always clean, well maintained, and very comfortable. The rooms are spotless, carefully arranged, and consistently prepared with great attention to detail. You can clearly feel the care and professionalism behind the housekeeping work.

I’d like to sincerely thank Hasnaa and Khadija, who take care of the cleanliness and organization of the rooms with great dedication and attention to detail. A special thank you as well to the housekeeping team manager,

I stayed at the Hilton Garden Inn from December 26, 2025, to January 6, 2026. The reception was courteous, and the hotel maintains satisfactory security measures. The rooms are maintained in a clean condition, and the staff efficiently ensures tidiness. The accommodations are spacious and comfortable. The breakfast offerings are plentiful and served with professionalism. Overall, it is an excellent place for individuals seeking relaxation in a tranquil environment away from urban congestion. For football enthusiasts, the rooms are equipped with large televisions, eliminating the need to visit

I was here with my parents at the end of October and we had a lovely and relaxing stay! I'd never been to Casablanca before, so I was really looking forward to it :-)

Check-in was quick and friendly. Breakfast was good; many thanks to Moncef and the other lady who helped with the scrambled eggs (unfortunately, I forgot her name...). Everything was great, keep it up!

While this hotel in Casablanca is located on the outskirts rather than in the city center, its positioning is ideal as it sits midway between the international airport and the downtown area. This makes travel exceptionally easy with a rental car, and the quiet environment is a significant plus. Although the surroundings have changed significantly and the room rates have increased considerably compared to five years ago, I continue to use this hotel specifically because of its highly convenient accessibility. The wide parking lot and the attached traditional Moroccan restaurant are added benefi

Very nice experience. The staff is friendly and very attentive. Alot of construction in the area and traffic may be distruptive to and from the hotel, but tolerable. Located between the airport and Cassablanca, with cinvenient acces to the expressway. Highly recommended. Only complaint, water pressure is not consistent. Garage and outdoor parking available

Excellent hotel,  clean rooms, helpful staff, fresh linen and towels everyday. Breakfast choice is fantastic and the chef Moncef goes above and beyond to be helpful and cook at request. Highly recommended for a less stressful stay compared to downtown Casablanca.

Loved the atmosphere. It’s a beautiful hotel, it’s fresh and amazingly clean, comfortable.  Dinner at the restaurant was delicious and breakfast couldn’t be better! Don’t look anywhere else, this is the hotel if you are coming to relax and have a car. Thank you Soumia Mehdi at the hotel.

I stayed here with my family and we all loved our experience in this hotel. The moment we came in, the staff was extremely welcoming and helpful especially Faouzi and Amaima (I may be wrong, I forgot her name), their customer service was perfect. The rooms were spaceful and very clean. I definetely recommend staying in this hotel if you come to Casablanca.

The family rooms are large and well equipped. They were very clean.
The swimming pool is not heated unfortunately.
Good internet connection.
The location is good for 1 night before airport but you will depend on taxi because the hotel is stuck between highways.
The service at the restaurant was really slow but OK overall.lacking child friendly items like playground or games room

Great Stay with Exceptional Service!

I had a wonderful stay at this hotel! As first-time visitors to Casablanca,I needed help booking train tickets to Fes, and Khalid at the front desk went above and beyond to assist us. He was very patient, friendly, and took the time to look up the schedule and guide us through the process. Thanks to his help, our travel plans went smoothly. The service here truly stands out—highly recommended for a comfortable and supportive stay in Casablanca!
A very nice and CLEAN Hilton! Located quite far from down town Casablanca, but very good for business travel. Ample breakfast and spacious, clean rooms. Decent gym.

Food department very bad. Room service in on 5pm to 9pm. In that slot ordered for a sandwich which was bland so much that I had to remove the chicken to eat it. Highlight is they don't give water in the room (just once at check in time) even if asked for. I said worse case I can pay still they don't. We have to go down and purchase from the shop. Not at all expected from a Hilton group hotel.

The stay was made much more exciting by the help of Mr Ahmed,  Ms Uumaina and Imane at the concierge. Specially, Uumaina is a super brilliant staff. Who exceeded our total expectations. I wish her all the best in her profession. Simply a super star! 👌

Excellent staff : Hiba, Mehdi and Youssef are very friendly and professional. They make the difference. I am a Hilton Honor Diamond member and the service is the most important thing to me. The staff delivers.
Great stay at Hilton Casablanca! The hotel is clean and comfortable. Big shoutout to Oumamima at the front desk — she’s super sweet and very helpful. Made myself and family stay even better! 🌟

Great time, needs some minor improvements but overall service is great. They’re not the fastest but they do respond and room service is fast depending on the requests. WiFi is spotty and I’m sure it will improve. I think this is some of the trouble with new hotels and working out all the bugs.  Location to the airport is great but not much around the hotel.

One-Night Stay at Hilton Garden Inn Casablanca Airport 🛬🌃

I stayed here for just one night before my flight, and honestly, the place is lovely! 💕 The location is perfect — super close to the airport, which made everything so convenient. The hotel itself is clean, stylish, and very well-maintained 🧼✨

What really stood out to me was the front desk staff 🧑‍💼👩‍💼 — they were all smiles and so friendly! We even had a sweet little chat about my country 🇦🇪 and my trip around Morocco 🇲🇦. It was such a fun and warm conversation that made me feel very welcome 🫶

The room was spacious, clean, and peacef

On arrival, security kindly directed me to the car park and I was even shown the entrance by another guest great first impression. The outside is very dusty due to ongoing construction, so not really the place if you’re looking for a relaxing getaway right now.

The lobby was very clean and welcoming. Check-in could have been smoother I wasn’t acknowledged at first, and the receptionist seemed a little unprepared, though she did explain she was new and working alone. Management should definitely provide more support and training here.

The room was spotless, comfortable, and even came with a s

Hotel is comfortable but coffee machines in the breakfast restaurant are terrible. They were not able to change them for 3 years. Nothing goes better for this place. People stays due to the lack of capacity in Casablanca.

My fiancé and I booked a night at this hotel to be close to the airport for an early morning flight. Unfortunately, we were unable to check in normally because I’m Moroccan and was traveling with my American fiancée without a marriage certificate. From my understanding, this policy is outdated and has no clear legal basis. Morocco is moving forward, and I hope more establishments reflect this progress. Sharing a hotel room does not automatically imply anything beyond accommodation.
GOOD
Amazing stay, thank you. Service was great. Specially had a great time at the lounge.

Very friendly service, with a wonderful culinary experience.
Thank you again, Zakaria Dahbi.
Excellent service from Hassan Amine during our stay at the Hilton Garden
A huge thank you to Hassan for his warm welcome and kindness. Always smiling, helpful, and attentive, he made our stay very pleasant with his professionalism and good humor.
Zakaria is a person who deserves a promotion; he is a kind and respectable man.
Zakaria best customer service
Thank you very much Zakaria, excellent service
Excellent service from the team, especially Zakaria.
Mr. Zakaria Dahbi provides good service and communicates very well with clients.
Excellent service.
He treated them well, Karim and Hassan Kessi

We recently stayed at the Hilton Garden Inn and had a very pleasant experience. The property offers a quiet and comfortable atmosphere in a highly convenient location. From the moment we arrived until our departure, the staff — especially the door staff — were consistently polite, friendly, attentive, and could not do enough to assist us.

The hotel was exceptionally clean, and the rooms were comfortable, well arranged, and offered very good value. While the rooms were slightly compact, they were still very well maintained and enjoyable for an overnight or longer stay. The breakfast was fresh,

Part of my assignment in Morocco allowed me to stay in this hotel for over 3 months. Great experience, the suite rooms are lovely and the staff is great! Special mention to Lahcen, Mohammed, Zakaria and Bader. The location is in the South of Casablanca and is very accessible and worked great for my work there.
(+) Had to extend and ended staying over 4 months. Again awesome experience and wanted to also mention the cleaning crew and especially Hasna and Abir. Thank you all for the great experience!

I had a great stay at Hilton Garden Inn Casablanca Sud and it definitely deserves a 5-star rating. From check-in to check-out, everything was smooth, professional, and well organized. The hotel offers a modern and آرام atmosphere, perfect سواء for business trips or a relaxing stay.
The rooms are spacious, clean, and very comfortable. The bed was excellent, and I appreciated the attention to detail in the room setup, including amenities and cleanliness. It’s clear that the hotel maintains high standards, which made my stay even more enjoyable.
The staff were incredibly welcoming and helpful. Th
We thank Ssi Zaid

Excellent service overall.
We were very well received, and thanks to Mr. Zakaria's help, especially at lunchtime, we lacked nothing. He was available and very helpful.
Thank you again.

Very poor room service quality with low choice. Breakfast badly organized and table dirty - not prepared for new guests. Have to ask for tea and they just open the tray of a cabinet. Housekeeping.takes some shopping bags out without approval. Disappointing hotel

Lovely Hotel! The rooms were really nice – super modern and the swimming pool was great. Breakfast wasn’t quite to my taste, but everything else was fabulous. A big shout Younus (not sure if the spelling is correct, sorry) who checked me in and also out, he was amazing, polite, friendly and very helpful from start to finish. 👏🏽
We stayed at this hotel for our last night before travelling back to the UK and really enjoyed it. Gutted we were only there for one night! Looking forward to going again as the hotel is lovely and beautiful!!! 🤩

Location isn’t ideal for me, as there’s nothing really n
Shout out to Youness he went  beyond to satisfy our requests. It wasn’t my first stay there and each time he did an amazing job.
The manager Mehdi did a great job with the service, and the breakfast foods were delicious.
Mr. Mehdi the restaurant manager is very kind and supportive and tried to manage vegetarian food for us.
Anas at the Lounge is the best. He knows customer service like no one else. Great employee. He should be rewarded for his management of the Lounge and it's services.

We stayed in this hotel for one night. Although we were not able to do early check-in, we got an upgrade, the service was great, continental breakfast had some Moroccan food, rooms comfortable. Keep in mind that it’s close to airport, but really far from downtown and Casablanca traffic can get congested at times. So keep in mind time while traveling. Would recommend and come back for another stay.

Newly built, nice sized room. We had a room with suit on 7 th floor, good views . Clean room, nice 1.5 bathroom .
Service and restaurant were perfect. Their parking lot is underground and entrance is extremely tight , almost scraped the car .
Other wise it’s a great place.

We stayed here to have a convenient hotel not too far from the airport. That is exactly what we got, clean and efficient. I also liked the fact that they added a baby seat for our 1year old for the airport transport. There is also an awesome Moroccan restaurant right next to the hotel with some great dishes.
They charge extra for late check outs after 3pm and the airport transfer is 400dirhams for one way. It is a bit expensive, but is worth it if you are after convenience.
